hud.menu_open: Please close the current menu first.
ui.zoom_hint: Click anywhere or press Escape to return
gmcm.not_ready: Load a save file first to see configuration options.
gmcm.hotkey_tooltip: If the hotkey doesn't work, check for conflicts with other mods.
gmcm.cancel_hotkey_tooltip: Press this key to cancel a screenshot in progress.
gmcm.scale_tooltip: Higher scales produce larger images. 100% on large maps may cause lag or memory issues.
gmcm.output_format_tooltip: PNG is lossless but larger. JPEG is smaller with minimal quality loss.
gmcm.jpeg_quality_tooltip: JPEG compression quality. Higher values mean better quality but larger files.
gmcm.use_game_screenshot_folder_tooltip: Save screenshots to the game's default screenshot folder instead of the mod folder.
gmcm.delete_original_tooltip: After adding the grid overlay, delete the game's original screenshot (without grid). If disabled, both files will be kept.
log.size_warning: Map size {w}x{h} exceeds safety limit, scaled to {w2}x{h2}
error.disk_full: Insufficient disk space or permission denied.
error.timeout: Screenshot timed out. Please try again.
error.not_at_location: Please go to the target location first.
error.game_screenshot_unavailable: Game screenshot feature not available in this version.
error.delete_failed: Failed to delete original screenshot. Both files kept.
